prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade to a pair of **Garrett GTX4202R Gen II** turbos (S36B44 engine, stock internals retained) with **Precision Turbo 46mm wastegates** and **Tial MV-R 50mm external wastegate actuators**, paired with a **Vargas GC 3.5L billet compressor wheel upgrade** for reduced lag and 750whp capability on E85

**Dorch Engineering Stage 3+ S36B44 engine build** with **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 CR)**, **Pauter billet connecting rods**, **ARP L19 head studs**, and **Ferrea Competition Series intake/exhaust valves** with **Supertech dual valve springs** for 8,500 RPM stability

**Motec M150 ECU with full flex-fuel mapping** integrated with a **Bosch Motorsport 0261002048 high-pressure fuel pump**, **Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors**, and a **Radium Engineering dual-catch can system** to eliminate blow-by under sustained boost (targeting 2.2 bar peak)
estetica: **Vorsteiner V-RT Aero Kit** (carbon fiber front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser) with **custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap** over the entire body, including **debadged kidney grilles** and **Gintani carbon fiber hood** with functional heat extractors

**HRE FF03 22x11 ET25 wheels** in **Forgeline center-lock conversion** (BMW M-specific hub adapters) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (305/25R22)**, paired with **AP Racing 400mm two-piece rotors** and **Endless CC-RG6 brake pads** for track duty

**OEM+ M Performance carbon fiber mirror caps** with **Lux H8 V4 Angel Eyes (3000K amber fogs)** and a **custom Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system** with **quad 100mm carbon tips** and **valvetronic bypass for aggressive cold-start pops
